rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout
rawCommits.body:
Add new AURA 3D app to the app registry with Box icon at /3d route.
Three-tab studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize) with stub content,
left nav for asset history, and Zustand store for app state. Adds
three.js dependency for upcoming WebGL 3D model viewer.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add image generation flow with sidekick panels
rawCommits.body:
Replace tab-based layout with simplified single-page flow: image
generation on top, 3D model section below. Wire SSE image generation
stream with style lock prompt. Add sidekick with Images and Models
tabs for asset management. Model selector follows ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Remove old tab stubs (ImagineTab, GenerateTab,
TokenizeTab).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add image generation flow with sidekick panels

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow
rawCommits.body:
Create Three.js scene with 4-light rig, GLTF model loader with
auto-center/scale, and WebGLViewer component with full lifecycle
cleanup. Wire 3D generation SSE stream via Tripo. Add viewer
controls for grid, wireframe, and texture toggling. Source image
auto-populates from image generation.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add project selector, feature flag, and store tests
rawCommits.body:
Add project selector dropdown to left nav matching ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Gate AURA 3D app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D
feature flag. Add 9 unit tests covering store state transitions,
generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add project selector, feature flag, and store tests

rawCommits.subject: fix(generation): handle upstream SSE frames without event line
rawCommits.body:
The aura-router sends generation events as data-only frames
(data: {"type":"start",...}) without a separate event: line.
The proxy was silently dropping these. Now extracts the type
from the JSON data field when no event line is present.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: handle upstream SSE frames without event line

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish
rawCommits.body:
Add IMAGE section title matching 3D MODEL header. Add click-to-expand
lightbox overlay for generated images with backdrop close and X button.
Set 50/50 split between image and model sections. Center empty state
content. Remove unused search placeholder from registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix
rawCommits.body:
Replace horizontal split with Image/3D Model tabs per feedback.
Use LeftMenuTree from features/left-menu for left nav consistency
with Projects app. Remove section title headers (tabs replace them).
Fix SSE proxy to extract event type from JSON data field when
upstream omits the event line. Update empty state text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): use project tree nav matching Projects app
rawCommits.body:
Replace custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree showing projects
as expandable groups. Clicking a project expands it and selects it.
Generated images appear as children under the active project. Matches
the Projects app left nav pattern exactly.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use project tree nav matching Projects app

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence backend
rawCommits.body:
Add StorageProjectArtifact and CreateProjectArtifactRequest types
to aura-os-storage with client methods for list, create, get, and
delete. Proxy handlers in aura-os-server forward to aura-storage
with JWT auth. Routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts and
/api/artifacts/:id.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence backend

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence to store
rawCommits.body:
Add artifacts API client and wire persistence into the store. On
project select, load artifacts from aura-storage and convert to
store types. Strip style lock suffix from stored prompts for display.
Link images to models via sourceImageId/parentId. Artifact save is
handled by the router — frontend only loads and maps.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence to store

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls
rawCommits.body:
Left nav shows images and models with icons under each project,
with prefixed IDs for correct selection dispatch. Sidekick panels
use thumbnail grid for both images and models with section headings.
Viewer controls replaced with icon toggle buttons. Generate 3D
button hidden when model already loaded. Progress messages cycle
during generation. Image preview enlarged and source image
shown full-size.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): wire parentId chain and require project selection
rawCommits.body:
Capture artifactId from image SSE completed event and pass it as
parentId when generating 3D. Proxy forwards parentId to the router
so model artifacts link to their source image. Disable prompt input
and Generate 3D button when no project is selected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: wire parentId chain and require project selection

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app
rawCommits.body:
Remove VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag and isAura3DEnabled check.
AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app

rawCommits.subject: fix(aura3d): move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404
rawCommits.body:
Artifact routes in process_routes were shadowed by axum router
merge — GET returned 404 while OPTIONS passed via CORS. Moving
to project_routes where all /api/projects/:project_id routes
live resolves the trie conflict.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404

rendered.title: AURA 3D studio lands alongside release pipeline hardening
rendered.intro: Today's nightly introduces AURA 3D, a brand-new in-app studio that takes a prompt from image generation all the way to a live WebGL 3D model viewer, with project-scoped persistence backing every asset. Around it, the release team tightened the nightly publishing pipeline, sharpened AI-driven changelog screenshot proofing, and fixed a Windows updater handoff regression.

entries.title: Nightly release prune, gh-pages recovery, and GPT-5.5 in the picker
entries.summary: The morning block hardened the nightly release pipeline end-to-end and shipped GPT-5.5 as a selectable chat model, while overhauling how AI-driven changelog screenshots are chosen and framed.

items.text: Nightly releases now prune stale assets through a retry-aware shell script that tolerates missing releases, and a new Sync Release Changelog Media History workflow keeps gh-pages history in step with the latest entries.
GPT-5.5 is now a first-class option in the chat model picker, with matching benchmark pricing wired through the interface and server dev loop.

The daily changelog media pipeline learned to tell raw contextual screenshots (pickers, menus, settings rows) apart from branded product cards, rejects maintenance-only or desktop-updater changes as screenshot targets, and preserves crisper framing for proof captures.
Usage reports from the server now include ZERO Pro status so downstream clients can reflect entitlement alongside usage counts.

media.reason: GPT-5.5 landing as a selectable option in the chat model picker is a concrete, screenshotable micro-UI surface. The rest of the entry (nightly release pipeline, gh-pages recovery, changelog media tooling, ZERO Pro usage field) is release/infra/backend and not screenshot-worthy.
reasons: GPT-5.5 landing as a selectable option in the chat model picker is a concrete, screenshotable micro-UI surface. The rest of the entry (nightly release pipeline, gh-pages recovery, changelog media tooling, ZERO Pro usage field) is release/infra/backend and not screenshot-worthy.

entries.title: AURA 3D: new studio app with WebGL viewer
entries.summary: A new AURA 3D app lands in the registry, going from a three-tab scaffold to a working prompt → image → 3D model flow backed by Three.js and a Tripo generation stream.

items.text: AURA 3D is registered as a new app at /3d with its own left nav, main panel, and sidekick, initially scaffolded as an Imagine/Generate/Tokenize studio and then collapsed into a single-page image-above-model flow with an Images/Models sidekick.

Image generation streams over SSE with a style-locked prompt and feeds the resulting image directly into a Three.js WebGL viewer, which loads GLTF models with auto-center/scale and a 4-light rig, plus toggles for grid, wireframe, and texture.

A project selector dropdown modeled on the ChatInputBar pattern lands in the left nav, initially gated behind a VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D flag with unit tests covering the Zustand store's state transitions.

media.reason: A brand-new AURA 3D app with a WebGL viewer, prompt-to-image-to-3D flow, and left nav / sidekick is a prominent new product surface that a single screenshot can prove.
reasons: A brand-new AURA 3D app with a WebGL viewer, prompt-to-image-to-3D flow, and left nav / sidekick is a prominent new product surface that a single screenshot can prove.

entries.title: SSE generation proxy handles data-only frames
entries.summary: The generation proxy now survives upstream events that omit an explicit event line.

items.text: aura-os-server's generation handler now extracts the event type from the JSON data field when the aura-router emits data-only SSE frames, instead of silently dropping them and stalling image or 3D generation.

media.reason: Backend-only SSE proxy fix in Rust for data-only frames. No visible UI state change that a static screenshot can prove.
reasons: Backend-only SSE proxy fix in Rust for data-only frames. No visible UI state change that a static screenshot can prove.

entries.title: AURA 3D tabs, lightbox, and Projects-style left nav
entries.summary: Follow-up polish restructures AURA 3D around Image/3D Model tabs and brings its left nav in line with the Projects app.

items.text: The horizontal image/model split is replaced with Image and 3D Model tabs, and generated images gain a click-to-expand lightbox with backdrop-close and an explicit X control.
The custom project dropdown is swapped for the shared LeftMenuTree from the Projects app, so projects expand inline and generated images appear as children under the active project.

media.reason: Restructured AURA 3D around Image/3D Model tabs and a Projects-style LeftMenuTree nav with inline project expansion — these are clear, visible structural UI changes that one screenshot can prove.
reasons: Restructured AURA 3D around Image/3D Model tabs and a Projects-style LeftMenuTree nav with inline project expansion — these are clear, visible structural UI changes that one screenshot can prove.

entries.title: AURA 3D artifacts persist per project
entries.summary: AURA 3D gains a real backend: images and 3D models are stored as project artifacts and reload automatically when switching projects.

items.text: A new project artifacts API in aura-os-storage and aura-os-server exposes list/create/get/delete under /api/projects/:id/artifacts and /api/artifacts/:id, with JWT-forwarded proxy handlers and a routing fix that moves the routes under project_routes to avoid a 404-on-GET trie conflict.

Selecting a project now loads its artifacts from aura-storage into the AURA 3D store, stripping the style-lock suffix for display and linking each 3D model to its source image via sourceImageId/parentId passed through the generation stream.

Left nav, sidekick, and viewer are polished together: images and models appear as icon-prefixed children per project, the sidekick uses a thumbnail grid with section headings, viewer controls become icon toggles, and Generate 3D is hidden once a model is loaded with cycling progress messages during generation.
The VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag is removed — AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.

media.reason: Artifact persistence itself is backend, but the user-visible polish (icon-prefixed images/models as children under projects in left nav, thumbnail grid sidekick with section headings, icon-toggle viewer controls) is a clear visible change. Prefer capturing the sidekick thumbnail grid plus nav tree as proof.
reasons: Artifact persistence itself is backend, but the user-visible polish (icon-prefixed images/models as children under projects in left nav, thumbnail grid sidekick with section headings, icon-toggle viewer controls) is a clear visible change. Prefer capturing the sidekick thumbnail grid plus nav tree as proof.

entries.title: Windows updater handoff fix and changelog capture rebuild
entries.summary: Late-evening work fixes a Windows auto-update handoff regression and substantially rebuilds the changelog screenshot capture pipeline.

items.text: The Windows desktop updater handoff is fixed in the Tauri main/updater paths, with the desktop-validate workflow and local auto-update smoke script updated to verify the corrected behavior.

Changelog media capture gets a major overhaul: a new demo-screenshot-quality module, a navigation lessons corpus, and a smarter seed planner are added, while the media heuristic now penalizes subtle maintenance fixes, interface-support-only code, and desktop-only updater changes so only genuinely screenshot-able product surfaces are captured.

media.reason: Windows updater handoff fix is a non-visual reliability change, and the rest is changelog media capture tooling — neither is a product surface a static screenshot can prove.
reasons: Windows updater handoff fix is a non-visual reliability change, and the rest is changelog media capture tooling — neither is a product surface a static screenshot can prove.
